battleTraits.name: DISEASED
battleTraits.effect: Each time an attack made by a friendly model scores a critical hit, you receive 1 disease point, to a maximum of 7.

battleTraits.name: NURGLE’S EMBRACE
battleTraits.effect: Spend any number of your disease points. For each disease point you spend, pick an enemy unit that is in combat with any of your units and roll a dice. On a 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on that unit.

battleTraits.name: DAEMONIC SUMMONING
battleTraits.description: One of your Pusgoyle Blightlords and one of your Plaguebearers units are not set up during deployment. From the third battle round onwards, they can use this ability.
battleTraits.effect: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units.

regimentAbilities.name: LOCUS OF FECUNDITY
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Phase, Your Hero Phase
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit.
regimentAbilities.effect: Heal (D3) that unit.

regimentAbilities.name: INFESTED WITH WONDERS
regimentAbilities.effect: Each time a friendly model is slain, before it is removed from play, you can pick an enemy unit within 1" of it and roll a dice. On a 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on that unit.

enhancements.name: SUMMONER OF PLAGUEBEARERS
enhancements.declare: Pick a friendly Plaguebearers unit wholly within 14" of your general.
enhancements.effect: Return 1 slain model to that unit.

enhancements.name: GARDENER OF NURGLE
enhancements.declare: If your general is contesting an objective not contested by any enemy models, roll a dice.
enhancements.effect: On a 3+, that objective is considered by you to be desecrated. Friendly units have Ward (4+) while they are contesting a desecrated objective.

enhancements.name: PESTILENT BREATH
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy unit within 7" of your general and roll a dice for each model in that unit.
enhancements.effect: For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on that unit.

enhancements.name: GIFT OF FEBRILE FRENZY
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
enhancements.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly units while they are wholly within 7" of your general.

battleTraits.name: DEATH’S DESCENT
battleTraits.description: Your Vargheists unit is not set up during deployment. From the third battle round onwards, it can use the Swoop Down ability.
battleTraits.effect: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units.

battleTraits.name: THE HUNGER
battleTraits.effect: Each time a friendly VAMPIRE unit uses a FIGHT ability, after all of its attacks have been resolved, Heal (X) that VAMPIRE unit where X is the number of damage points allocated by those attacks.

regimentAbilities.name: ENDLESS LEGIONS
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly Deathrattle Skeletons unit that has been destroyed.
regimentAbilities.effect: You can set up a replacement unit with D6 models in friendly territory more than 6" from enemy units.

regimentAbilities.name: RUINOUS CHARGERS
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick your Blood Knights unit to use this ability if it charged this turn.
regimentAbilities.effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on each enemy unit it passed across during that CHARGE ability.

enhancements.name: GRAVE-SAND SHARD
enhancements.declare: You declared the ‘Skeleton Legion’ ability for a unit within 9" of your general.
enhancements.effect: Add 1 to each legion roll made for that unit.

enhancements.name: CLOUD OF BATS
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase
enhancements.effect: Remove your general from the battlefield and set them up again anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units.

enhancements.name: AURA OF NIGHT
enhancements.effect: Ignore negative modifiers to save rolls for shooting attacks that target your general.

enhancements.name: SPIRIT GALE
enhancements.declare: Make a casting roll of 2D6.
enhancements.effect: On a 7+, inflict 1 mortal damage on each enemy unit on the battlefield.

battleTraits.name: FORTIFY POSITION
battleTraits.effect: Subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of weapons used for attacks that target friendly CASTELITE units if they did not use a MOVE ability in the same turn.

regimentAbilities.name: WELL PROVISIONED
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly non-HERO unit to be the target.
regimentAbilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, add 1 to wound rolls for that unit’s shooting attacks for the rest of the phase.

regimentAbilities.name: RESPECTED LEADER
regimentAbilities.effect: Friendly Wildercorps Hunters units gain the REINFORCEMENTS keyword.

enhancements.name: ADEPT TACTICIAN
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick 2 friendly Freeguild Fusiliers units that have been destroyed and have not already been replaced.
enhancements.effect: Set up a single replacement Freeguild Fusiliers unit with 10 models more than 6" from all enemy units.

enhancements.name: SHIELD BASH
enhancements.timing: Once Per Turn, Your Movement Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy INFANTRY, WAR MACHINE or CAVALRY unit in combat with your general to be the target.
enhancements.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target must immediately use the ‘Retreat’ ability as if it were the enemy movement phase.

enhancements.name: BRACE!
enhancements.effect: Your general has WARD (5+).

enhancements.name: POINT-BLANK VOLLEY
enhancements.timing: Once Per Turn, Enemy Combat Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with your general to be the target.
enhancements.effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.

battleTraits.name: THE UNQUIET DEAD
battleTraits.description: One of your Deathrattle Skeletons units is not set up during deployment. From the third battle round onwards, it can use the Rising Dead ability.
battleTraits.effect: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield wholly within 3" of a battlefield edge and more than 6" from all enemy units.

battleTraits.name: AURA OF ANTIQUITY
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Combat Phase
battleTraits.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with any friendly units to be the target.
battleTraits.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of the target’s melee weapons until the start of your next turn.

regimentAbilities.name: OVERWHELMING HORDES
regimentAbilities.effect: Add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks made by friendly non-HERO units that target a unit that has fewer models than the attacking unit.

regimentAbilities.name: DEATHMARCH
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly non-HERO unit that is not in combat to be the target.
regimentAbilities.effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1" to the target’s Move characteristic and add 3 to its control score.

enhancements.name: SHYISHAN BLADE
enhancements.effect: The Rend characteristic of your general’s Baleful Tomb Blade is 2.

enhancements.name: STOLEN ANIMUS
enhancements.effect: Each time your general scores a critical hit, Heal (2) your general after the ATTACK ability has been resolved.

enhancements.name: PROPELLED BY HATE
enhancements.declare: Pick another friendly unit wholly within 12" of your general to be the target.
enhancements.effect: You can re-roll charge rolls for the target for the rest of the turn.

enhancements.name: SOUL-DRAIN PENDANT
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with your general to be the target.
enhancements.effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, the target has STRIKE-LAST for the rest of the turn.

battleTraits.name: THE QUARRY
battleTraits.effect: If no enemy units are the quarry, pick an enemy unit to be the quarry (you can pick an enemy unit in reserve).

battleTraits.name: BLOOD-DRENCHED
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Turn, End of Any Turn
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly unit that slew any enemy models using a FIGHT ability this turn to be the target.
battleTraits.effect: For the rest of the battle, the target’s melee weapons have Crit (Mortal).

regimentAbilities.name: THE SCENT OF BLOOD
regimentAbilities.effect: Add 1 to hit rolls and add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks that target an enemy unit that had any damage points allocated to it this turn.

regimentAbilities.name: SAVAGERY UPON SAVAGERY
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit in combat to be the target.
regimentAbilities.effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons. If the target is a HERO, add D3 to the Attacks characteristic of its melee weapons instead.

enhancements.name: SUSTAINED BY GORE
enhancements.effect: Heal (D3) your general.

enhancements.name: EVASIVE HUNTER
enhancements.effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls and wound rolls for shooting attacks that target your general.

enhancements.name: KILLING POUNCE
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Charge Phase
enhancements.effect: For the rest of the turn, when making charge rolls for your general, you can roll an additional dice, to a maximum of 3, but if you do, they must finish that charge in combat with the quarry.

enhancements.name: FURIOUS BITES
enhancements.effect: If your general is in combat with the quarry, inflict D3 mortal damage on the quarry.

battleTraits.name: TIDES OF DEATH (ROUND 1: LOW TIDE)
battleTraits.effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for shooting attacks that target this unit.

battleTraits.name: TIDES OF DEATH (ROUND 2: FLOOD TIDE)
battleTraits.effect: This unit can use a RUN ability and still use SHOOT and/or CHARGE abilities later in the turn.

battleTraits.name: TIDES OF DEATH (ROUND 3: HIGH TIDE)
battleTraits.effect: This unit has STRIKE-FIRST.

battleTraits.name: TIDES OF DEATH (ROUND 4: EBB TIDE)
battleTraits.effect: This unit can use a RETREAT ability and still use SHOOT and/or CHARGE abilities later in the turn.

regimentAbilities.name: WAY OF THE CRESTING WAVE
regimentAbilities.effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly Namarti Thralls units that charged in the same turn.

regimentAbilities.name: ETHERSEA PREDATORS
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn
regimentAbilities.effect: Pick a friendly CAVALRY unit that used a FIGHT ability this turn. Heal (D3) that unit.

enhancements.name: ARCH-RITUALIST
enhancements.effect: Add 1 to rolls for your general’s ‘Ritual of the Creeping Mist’ ability.

enhancements.name: STEELSHELL ARMOUR
enhancements.effect: Ignore all modifiers to save rolls for your general (positive and negative).

enhancements.name: MIND FLARE
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with your general.
enhancements.effect: Until the end of the phase, attacks made by that unit only score hits on unmodified hit rolls of 6.

enhancements.name: DELICIOUS MORSELS
enhancements.effect: Heal (1) each friendly CAVALRY unit within your general’s combat range.

battleTraits.name: ROYAL IMPERATIVE
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Battle (Army), Any Combat Phase
battleTraits.effect: You can only use this ability in the third battle round. Pick 1 of the following effects to apply for the rest of the battle round: Into Them!: Friendly units have STRIKE-FIRST. Strike Sure: Friendly units’ melee weapons have Crit (Mortal).

regimentAbilities.name: THE SPEAR OF ASPHOREN
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit that is not in combat to use this ability.
regimentAbilities.effect: Add 1 to charge rolls for that unit for the rest of the turn.

regimentAbilities.name: THE SHIELD OF ULCHISS
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit in combat to use this ability.
regimentAbilities.effect: For the rest of the turn, each time that unit uses a RETREAT ability, no mortal damage is inflicted on it.

enhancements.name: DUTIFUL SOULS
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" of your general to be the target.
enhancements.effect: You can return 1 slain model to the target unit. If the target is an INFANTRY unit, you can return D3 slain models to it instead.

enhancements.name: SHIMMERING AMULET
enhancements.effect: Your general has Ward (5+).

enhancements.name: VOLTAIC CHARGE
enhancements.effect: Your general’s Akhelian Royal Weapons have Charge (+1 Damage).

enhancements.name: SOUL STEALER
enhancements.effect: If your general is in combat, Heal (D3) your general.

battleTraits.name: THE OFFICER’S ORDER
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Battle Round, Start of Battle Round
battleTraits.declare: Pick a battle tactic card in your hand and place it face-down separately next to your other battle tactic cards.
battleTraits.effect: When you use the command on that card, it is not discarded but returns to your hand.

regimentAbilities.name: FOR SIGMAR, CHARGE!
regimentAbilities.effect: Friendly CAVALRY units have STRIKE-FIRST if they charged in the same turn.

regimentAbilities.name: IRONWELD DISCIPLINE
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Turn, Enemy Shooting Phase
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick your Ironweld Great Cannon to use this ability.
regimentAbilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, it can use the ‘Shoot’ ability as if it were your shooting phase.

enhancements.name: FLASK OF LETHISIAN DARKWATER
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Start of Any Turn
enhancements.effect: Heal (D6) your general.

enhancements.name: HEIRLOOM BLADE
enhancements.effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of your general’s Master-forged Longsword.

enhancements.name: BRAZIER OF HOLY FLAME
enhancements.declare: Pick a friendly Freeguild Steelhelms unit within your general’s combat range.
enhancements.effect: You can return up to D3 slain models to that unit.

enhancements.name: GLIMMERING
enhancements.effect: Each phase, you can re-roll 1 hit roll, or 1 wound roll, or 1 save roll made for your general.

battleTraits.name: TEMPTATIONS OF SLAANESH
battleTraits.effect: You receive 6 temptation dice. Offer them on failed enemy rolls. If accepted, roll becomes 6 and you gain D6 depravity points. If rejected, enemy unit takes D3 mortal damage.

battleTraits.name: DEPRAVITY ABILITIES (12+ DP: TANTALISING TORMENT)
battleTraits.effect: This unit can use a RUN ability and still use CHARGE abilities later in the turn.

battleTraits.name: DEPRAVITY ABILITIES (18+ DP: SADISTIC SPITE)
battleTraits.effect: This unit’s melee weapons have CRIT (MORTAL).

battleTraits.name: DEPRAVITY ABILITIES (24+ DP: OBLIVIOUS INDULGENCE)
battleTraits.effect: This unit has WARD (5+).

regimentAbilities.name: UNPARALLELED SPEED
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit to use this ability.
regimentAbilities.effect: That unit has STRIKE-FIRST this phase.

regimentAbilities.name: LOCUS OF DIVERSION
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Turn, Your Movement Phase
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit to use this ability.
regimentAbilities.effect: For the rest of the turn, that unit can use a RETREAT ability and still use SHOOT and/or CHARGE abilities later in the turn.

enhancements.name: SCEPTRE OF DOMINATION
enhancements.declare: Roll a dice for each enemy unit in combat with your general.
enhancements.effect: On a 5+, the unit being rolled for has STRIKE-LAST this phase.

enhancements.name: TWISTED MIRROR
enhancements.timing: Once Per Turn, Your Shooting Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy unit within 9" of your general and roll a dice.
enhancements.effect: On a 4+, subtract 1 from save rolls for that unit until the start of your next turn.

enhancements.name: CACOPHONIC CHOIR
enhancements.declare: Make a casting roll of 2D6.
enhancements.effect: On a 6+, make a cacophony roll of D6. Inflict D3 mortal damage on each enemy unit within 6" of your general that has a Control characteristic less than the cacophony roll.

enhancements.name: PENDANT OF SLAANESH
enhancements.effect: Heal (D3) your general.

battleTraits.name: OATHS OF DARKNESS
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
battleTraits.effect: You can reveal 1 battle tactic card in your hand to your opponent. If you do so, that battle tactic card becomes your oath for the rest of the turn. If you score the battle tactic on your oath this turn, your oath is fulfilled. Instead of discarding the card, it is placed to one side but you can still use the command on it.

regimentAbilities.name: RAGE OF ARKHAR
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit in combat to be the target.
regimentAbilities.effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to the Attacks and Rend characteristics of the target’s melee weapons (does not affect Companion weapons).

regimentAbilities.name: FEARLESS INVADERS
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit in combat to be the target.
regimentAbilities.effect: If the target uses a RETREAT ability this turn, no mortal damage is inflicted on it and it can still use CHARGE abilities later in the turn.

enhancements.name: BLOODTHIRSTY BLADE
enhancements.effect: The Rend characteristic of your general’s Rune-etched Axe is 2.

enhancements.name: GODSHADOW TALISMAN
enhancements.effect: Your general has Ward (4+).

enhancements.name: CHAMPION OF RAIDS
enhancements.declare: Pick another friendly unit wholly within 12" of your general to be the target.
enhancements.effect: The target can re-roll charge rolls for the rest of the turn.

enhancements.name: FELL RITUALIST
enhancements.effect: Each time you draw battle tactic cards, if your general is on the battlefield, you can choose to draw 1 additional battle tactic card, then put 1 of your battle tactic cards in your hand back at the bottom of your battle tactic deck.

battleTraits.name: BETTER LATE THAN NEVER
battleTraits.effect: A unit of Ironguts with 4 models is not set up during the deployment phase. Instead, in the third battle round, that unit can use the ‘Let’s Get Stuck In’ ability.

battleTraits.name: LET’S GET STUCK IN
battleTraits.effect: Set up this unit wholly within friendly territory, wholly within 6" of the battlefield edge, and not in combat.

regimentAbilities.name: IT’S A HARD LIFE
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly Gnoblars unit within your general’s combat range to be the target.
regimentAbilities.effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, Heal (X) your general where X is an amount equal to the roll, and 1 model in that Gnoblars unit is slain.

regimentAbilities.name: FRENZIED ARTILLERY
regimentAbilities.effect: If the unmodified charge roll for a friendly Gnoblar Scraplauncher is 6+, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of the target’s Companion weapons for the rest of the turn.

enhancements.name: SAVAGE INSTINCTS
enhancements.timing: Reaction: You declared a FIGHT ability for your general
enhancements.effect: Pick a friendly unit that has not used a FIGHT ability this turn and is within your general’s combat range to be the target. The target can be picked to use a FIGHT ability immediately after the FIGHT ability used by your general has been resolved.

enhancements.name: NASTY TRAP
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy unit within 12" of your general to be the target.
enhancements.effect: Give the target your general’s Trap token. While the target has a Trap token, each time the target is picked to use a MOVE or CHARGE ability, roll a dice. On a 4+, that MOVE or CHARGE ability has no effect and the target’s Trap token is removed.

enhancements.name: MASSIVE BULK
enhancements.effect: Add 2 to the Health characteristic of your general.

enhancements.name: VETERAN HUNTER
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Hero Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy unit within 12" of your general to be the target.
enhancements.effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to the Rend characteristic of your general’s combat attacks that target that unit.

battleTraits.name: FACETS OF WAR
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Battle Round, Start of Battle Round
battleTraits.effect: You must use this ability at the start of the battle round. Pick 1 FACET OF WAR ability. That FACET OF WAR ability can be used this battle round but the other cannot.

battleTraits.name: SHINING COMPANY
battleTraits.effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target friendly units.

battleTraits.name: POWER OF HYSH
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
battleTraits.effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, until the start of your next turn, attacks made by that unit score critical hits on unmodified hit rolls of 5+.

battleTraits.name: LIGHTNING REACTIONS
battleTraits.effect: When players are alternating picking units to use a FIGHT ability, when it is your turn to pick a unit, you can pick 2 units instead of 1. Resolve the second FIGHT ability immediately after the first.

regimentAbilities.name: ARCANE PROWESS
regimentAbilities.effect: Add 1 to casting rolls for your general.

regimentAbilities.name: HEIGHTENED REFLEXES
regimentAbilities.effect: Add 1 to save rolls for friendly units that use a FIGHT ability immediately after another friendly unit because of the ‘Lightning Reactions’ ability, until the end of the phase.

enhancements.name: OVERWHELMING HEAT
enhancements.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 24" of your general, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
enhancements.effect: On a 7+, halve the Move characteristic of that unit until the start of your next turn and roll a dice. If the roll equals or exceeds that unit’s Save characteristic, inflict D3 mortal damage on it.

enhancements.name: PROTECTION OF HYSH
enhancements.declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of your general to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
enhancements.effect: On a 7+, the target has WARD (5+) until the start of your next turn.

enhancements.name: WAYSTONE
enhancements.effect: Remove your general from the battlefield and set them up again anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units.

enhancements.name: SPEED OF HYSH
enhancements.declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 18" of your general, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
enhancements.effect: On a 5+, double the Move characteristic of that unit until the start of your next turn.

battleTraits.name: FAST AS FRAZZLEGIT
battleTraits.effect: Friendly units can use CHARGE abilities even if they used a RETREAT ability in the same turn. In addition, no mortal damage is inflicted on friendly units by RETREAT abilities.

regimentAbilities.name: FLANKIN’ FORCE
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Battle, Start of First Battle Round
regimentAbilities.effect: Pick up to 2 friendly units. Remove them from the battlefield and set them up again anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units.

regimentAbilities.name: FRAZZLEBOOM
regimentAbilities.effect: Each time a friendly WAR MACHINE is destroyed, before removing it from play, pick an enemy unit within 3" of that WAR MACHINE and roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that unit equal to the roll.

enhancements.name: KUNNIN’ AS A SNARLFANG
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
enhancements.effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to the Rend characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly units while they are wholly within 12" of the bearer.

enhancements.name: GLARE OF FRAZZLEGIT
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with your general to be the target.
enhancements.effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks made by the target for the rest of the turn.

enhancements.name: SUNSTEALA SHARD
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Enemy Shooting Phase
enhancements.effect: For the rest of the turn, friendly units cannot be targeted by shooting attacks while they are wholly within 6" of this unit, unless the attacking unit is in combat with the target unit.

enhancements.name: DEVIOUS BACKSTABBA
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy HERO in combat with this unit to be the target.
enhancements.effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.

battleTraits.name: BLOOD RITES
battleTraits.effect:
At the start of each battle round, all friendly units gain a Blood Rites passive ability. Units keep all Blood Rites abilities gained in previous rounds.
Round 1: QUICKENING BLOODLUST (Add 1 to run rolls).
Round 2: HEADLONG FURY (Add 1 to charge rolls).
Round 3: ZEALOT’S RAGE (Add 1 to hit rolls for combat attacks).
Round 4: SLAUGHTERER’S STRENGTH (Add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks).

regimentAbilities.name: MURDEROUS EPIPHANY
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase
regimentAbilities.effect: All friendly units gain the Blood Rites passive ability they would have gained at the start of the next battle round (they keep this ability for the rest of the battle, but they do not gain it for a second time at the start of the next battle round).

regimentAbilities.name: BLESSING OF KHAINE
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" of your general. You cannot pick your general.
regimentAbilities.effect: Add 1 to ward rolls for that unit this phase.

enhancements.name: BATHED IN BLOOD
enhancements.effect: Each time a model is slain by your general, Heal (1) your general.

enhancements.name: FUELLED BY REVENGE
enhancements.effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly Blood Stalkers units while they are wholly within 12" of your general.

enhancements.name: FLASK OF SHADEMIST
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
enhancements.effect: Until the end of the phase, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target friendly units while they are wholly within 12" of your general.

enhancements.name: ZEALOUS ORATOR
enhancements.declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 9" of your general that is not in combat. Roll a dice for each slain model from that unit.
enhancements.effect: For each 5+, you can return 1 slain model to that unit.

battleTraits.name: ETHEREAL
battleTraits.effect: Ignore negative modifiers to save rolls for friendly units.

battleTraits.name: SPECTRAL PROCESSION
battleTraits.description: 1 of your Bladegheist Revenants units and 1 of your Dreadscythe Harridans units start the battle in reserve. From the second battle round onwards, you can use the following ability:
battleTraits.effect: CACKLING ARRIVAL: Once Per Turn (Army). Declare: Pick 1 of your units in reserve. Effect: Set up that unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units.

regimentAbilities.name: DISCORPORATE
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit to be the target.
regimentAbilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, add 1 to save rolls for the target for the rest of the turn.

regimentAbilities.name: MOUNTING DREAD
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit to be the target.
regimentAbilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, subtract the current battle round number from the control scores of enemy units while they are in combat with the target.

enhancements.name: UNHOLY VISAGE
enhancements.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 6" of your general to be the target.
enhancements.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target must immediately use a Retreat ability as if it were the enemy movement phase.

enhancements.name: TALES OF HORROR
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy Infantry or Cavalry unit within 6" of your general to be the target.
enhancements.effect: For the rest of the battle, if the target is replaced using the ‘Call for Reinforcements’ ability, halve the number of models in the replacement unit, rounding up.

enhancements.name: DEATHLY POSSESSOR
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy HERO within 12" of your general to be the target, then pick another enemy unit within the target’s combat range to be the victim.
enhancements.effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, pick one: Inflict mortal damage on the target equal to the roll; Inflict mortal damage on the victim equal to the roll.

enhancements.name: SPECTRAL HOWL
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Hero Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy unit within 12" of your general to be the target.
enhancements.effect: For the rest of the turn, subtract 1 from the number of dice rolled when making charge rolls for the target, to a minimum of 1.

battleTraits.name: HARNESS DAEMONIC POWER
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
battleTraits.effect: You must use this ability at the start of each of your hero phases. Remove all daemonic power points from each friendly unit. Then, gain a number of daemonic power points equal to the current battle round number plus 1. Then, allocate your daemonic power points to friendly units. Each unit can have a maximum of 3 daemonic power points. Then, all unallocated daemonic power points are lost.

regimentAbilities.name: GRINDING ADVANCE
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick up to 2 friendly Infernal Cohort units to be the targets.
regimentAbilities.effect: Each target can immediately move up to 3" but cannot use Charge abilities in the first battle round.

regimentAbilities.name: SUPPRESSIVE BOMBARDMENT
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Turn, Your Shooting Phase
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick an enemy Infantry unit that had any damage points allocated to it this turn as a result of shooting attacks made by a friendly Tormentor Bombard to be the target.
regimentAbilities.effect: Until the start of your next turn, subtract 1 from the number of dice rolled when making charge rolls for the target, to a minimum of 1.

enhancements.name: SCROLL OF PETRIFICATION
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Hero Phase
enhancements.effect: For the rest of the turn, your general has Ward (2+) but cannot use abilities or be picked to be the target of friendly abilities.

enhancements.name: CHALICE OF DARKNESS
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Your Shooting Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of your general to be the target.
enhancements.effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.

enhancements.name: TALISMAN OF OBSIDIAN
enhancements.effect: Ignore the first damage point allocated to your general in each phase.

enhancements.name: AMULET OF BURNING HATE
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
enhancements.effect: For the rest of the turn, your general’s attacks score critical hits on unmodified hit rolls of 5+.

battleTraits.name: UNDER THE LIGHT OF THE BAD MOON
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Battle, Start of the First Battle Round
battleTraits.declare: Pick a territory (either friendly territory or enemy territory) to be under the Light of the Bad Moon.
battleTraits.effect: The territory picked remains under the Light of the Bad Moon in the first and second battle rounds. In the third and fourth battle rounds, the other territory is under the Light of the Bad Moon. While a friendly unit is wholly within the territory that is under the Light of the Bad Moon, the appropriate effect below applies to it: Frothing Zealots: If the unit is a Moonclan Stabbas unit, add 3 to its control score. Lunar Squigs: If the unit is a Squig Hoppers unit, no mortal damage is inflicted on it when it uses Retreat abilities. Moonlit Hide: If the unit is a Rockgut Troggoths unit, add 1 to save rolls for it.

battleTraits.name: SQUIGALANCHE
battleTraits.description: One of your units of Squig Hoppers is not set up during the deployment phase. Instead, from the third battle round onwards, they can use this ability.
battleTraits.effect: Set up this unit wholly within your territory, wholly within 3" of a battlefield edge and more than 6" from all enemy units.

regimentAbilities.name: THE LUNATIC HORDES
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly Moonclan Stabbas unit to use this ability.
regimentAbilities.effect: You can return up to D3 slain models to that unit.

regimentAbilities.name: THE HAND OF GORK
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Movement Phase
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit that is not in combat to use this ability.
regimentAbilities.effect: Remove that unit from the battlefield and set it up again more than 9" from all enemy units.

enhancements.name: FIGHT ANOTHER DAY
enhancements.declare: Pick your general to use this ability if they used a Fight ability this turn.
enhancements.effect: Your general can make a 2D6" move but cannot end that move in combat.

enhancements.name: THE CLAMMY COWL
enhancements.effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target your general.

enhancements.name: HALLUCINOGENIC FUNGUS BREW
enhancements.effect: Your general has Ward (4+) in the first battle round, Ward (5+) in the second battle round, and Ward (6+) in the third and fourth battle rounds.

enhancements.name: NIGHTSHADE MUSHROOM
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Enemy Movement Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick a friendly unit within your general’s combat range.
enhancements.effect: That unit cannot be targeted by shooting attacks in the next shooting phase.

battleTraits.name: THE BLOOD TITHE
battleTraits.effect: Each time a unit is destroyed during the battle, you receive 1 blood tithe point.

battleTraits.name: MURDERLUST
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Turn, Any Hero Phase
battleTraits.declare: Spend 1 blood tithe point and pick up to D3 friendly units.
battleTraits.effect: Each of those units can move D6" (roll for each).

battleTraits.name: HEADS MUST ROLL
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Turn, Any Hero Phase
battleTraits.declare: Spend 3 blood tithe points and pick up to 3 friendly units.
battleTraits.effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of those units’ melee weapons until the start of your next turn.

regimentAbilities.name: FAVOURED OF KHORNE
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Turn, Start of Your Turn
regimentAbilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, you receive 1 blood tithe point.

regimentAbilities.name: BLOOD-WOKEN RUNES
regimentAbilities.effect: Friendly units have Ward (5+) if they have used a Fight ability in the same phase.

enhancements.name: RESANGUINATION
enhancements.declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 16" of your general, then make a chanting roll of D6.
enhancements.effect: On a 3+, Heal (D3) that unit.

enhancements.name: UNHOLY FLAMES
enhancements.declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 16" of your general, then make a chanting roll of D6.
enhancements.effect: On a 4+, add 1 to the Rend characteristic of that unit’s melee weapons until the start of your next turn.

enhancements.name: HEADHUNTER
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy Hero in combat with your general.
enhancements.effect: Your general has Strike-first this phase, but all attacks made by them this phase must target that enemy Hero.

enhancements.name: THE CRIMSON PLATE
enhancements.effect: Your general has Ward (5+).

battleTraits.name: MASTERS OF DESTINY
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Battle, Start of the First Battle Round
battleTraits.effect: Roll 9 dice and put them to one side. These are your destiny dice. During the battle, instead of rolling the dice for 1 of the rolls from the list opposite, you can pick one of your destiny dice and use it as the roll. Once a destiny dice has been used, it is discarded. The following rolls can be replaced with destiny dice: Casting rolls, Run rolls, Charge rolls, Hit rolls, Wound rolls, Save rolls.

regimentAbilities.name: TRANSIENT FORMS
regimentAbilities.effect: Roll a dice each time a friendly Kairic Acolytes model is slain in the combat phase. On a 4+, you can return 1 slain model to a friendly Tzaangors unit within 9" of the slain model.

regimentAbilities.name: ETERNAL CONFLAGRATION
regimentAbilities.effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of ranged weapons used by friendly Flamers of Tzeentch units.

enhancements.name: SHIELD OF FATE
enhancements.declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 18" of your general, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
enhancements.effect: On a 6+, until the start of your next turn, that unit has Ward (6+). If that unit already has a ward save, add 1 to ward rolls for that unit until the start of your next turn instead.

enhancements.name: GLIMPSE THE FUTURE
enhancements.declare: If you have fewer than 6 destiny dice, make a casting roll of 2D6.
enhancements.effect: On a 7+, you can roll a dice and add it to your destiny dice.

enhancements.name: DAEMONHEART
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy unit within 1" of your general.
enhancements.effect: Inflict an amount of mortal damage on that unit equal to the number of the current battle round.

enhancements.name: TIMESLIP PENDANT
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy unit within 9" of your general.
enhancements.effect: That unit has Strike-last this phase.

battleTraits.name: GUNHAULER ESCORT
battleTraits.effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target friendly Kharadron Overlords Infantry units while they are wholly within 6" of a friendly Grundstok Gunhauler.

regimentAbilities.name: RAPID RELOCATION
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Movement Phase
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit with FLY to be the target.
regimentAbilities.effect: Remove the target from the battlefield and set it up again anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units. The target cannot use Charge abilities this turn.

regimentAbilities.name: PROPELLER DOWNDRAUGHT
regimentAbilities.effect: Subtract 1 from charge rolls for enemy units while they are within 9" of a friendly Grundstok Gunhauler.

enhancements.name: EMERGENCY FUEL INJECTION PODS
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle (Army), Any Combat Phase
enhancements.effect: Your general has Strike-first for the rest of the turn.

enhancements.name: PROSPECTOR AND PIONEER
enhancements.effect: Add 2 to your general’s control score.

enhancements.name: CELESTIUM-BURST BOMBLETS
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with your general to be the target.
enhancements.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, ward rolls cannot be made for the target for the rest of the turn.

enhancements.name: EXTRACTION FAIL-SAFES
enhancements.effect: Subtract 1 from the number of damage points inflicted on this unit when it uses a Retreat ability.

battleTraits.name: PLY THE SKIES
battleTraits.timing: Reaction: You declared a non-Charge Move ability for an Arkanaut Frigate
battleTraits.effect: Pick a friendly INFANTRY unit that is wholly within the combat range of that Arkanaut Frigate and not in combat to be transported. Remove that INFANTRY unit from the battlefield. Then, when the Arkanaut Frigate ends its move, set up the INFANTRY unit on the battlefield again, wholly within the combat range of the Arkanaut Frigate and not in combat. A unit cannot use Charge abilities if it was transported in the same turn.

regimentAbilities.name: ASSAULT BOAT
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit that was transported this turn to use this ability.
regimentAbilities.effect: That unit can still use Charge abilities later in the turn.

regimentAbilities.name: DISENGAGE
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly Arkanaut Frigate to use this ability.
regimentAbilities.effect: If that unit uses a RETREAT ability this phase, no mortal damage is inflicted on it and it can still use SHOOT abilities later in the turn.

enhancements.name: MASTERWROUGHT ARMOUR
enhancements.effect: Your general has WARD (6+).

enhancements.name: FLASK OF VINTAGE GOROGNA
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Hero Phase
enhancements.effect: Heal (D6) your general.

enhancements.name: THERE’S NO REWARD WITHOUT RISK
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Reaction: You declared a CHARGE ability for a unit wholly within 12" of your general
enhancements.effect: You can re-roll the charge roll for that CHARGE ability.

enhancements.name: LEAVE NO DUARDIN BEHIND
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick a friendly Arkanaut Company unit wholly within 12" of your general and roll a dice for each slain model from that unit.
enhancements.effect: For each 4+, you can return 1 slain model to that unit.

battleTraits.name: HIDDEN HUNTERS
battleTraits.description: Your 2 Hunters of Huanchi units and the Spawn of Chotec are not set up during the deployment phase. Instead, from the third battle round onwards, they can use the following ability:
battleTraits.effect: CHAMELEON AMBUSH: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units.

battleTraits.name: VENGEANCE OF AZYR
battleTraits.declare: Pick each enemy unit in combat with a friendly Saurus unit to be the targets.
battleTraits.effect: Roll a dice for each target. On a 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.

regimentAbilities.name: SCALED AEGIS
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly Saurus unit to be the target.
regimentAbilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, that unit has Ward (6+) until the start of your next turn.

regimentAbilities.name: FOLLOWERS OF HUANCHI
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly Skink unit to be the target.
regimentAbilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target’s ranged weapons have Crit (Auto-wound) for the rest of the turn, including Companion weapons.

enhancements.name: INSTINCTIVE COMMANDER
enhancements.declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of your general and not in combat to be the target.
enhancements.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target can immediately use the ‘Normal Move’ ability as if it were your movement phase.

enhancements.name: SAVAGE MAULING
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with your general to be the target.
enhancements.effect: Ward rolls cannot be made for the target for the rest of the turn.

enhancements.name: VENOMITE SWARM
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with your general to be the target.
enhancements.effect: If your general’s Venomites token is on the battlefield, roll a D3. On a 1, remove that token from the battlefield. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.

enhancements.name: BLESSED BY THE OLD ONES
enhancements.declare: Your general must use this ability if it has been destroyed. Roll a dice.
enhancements.effect: On a 2+, you can set up a replacement unit with 1 Sunblood model anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units.

battleTraits.name: LEY LINES
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Turn, End of Any Turn
battleTraits.effect: Heal (1) each friendly unit that is within 3" of any terrain features.

battleTraits.name: STRIKE AND FADE
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Turn, End of Any Turn
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly unit that used a FIGHT ability this turn and is within 3" of any terrain features, then roll a dice.
battleTraits.effect: On a 2+, remove that unit from the battlefield and set it up again so that each model in the unit is within 3" of any terrain features and more than 6" from all enemy units.

regimentAbilities.name: VENGEFUL SPIRITS OF THE LAND
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Turn, End of Any Turn
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit that is contesting an objective and roll a dice.
regimentAbilities.effect: On a 4+, inflict D3 mortal damage on that enemy unit.

regimentAbilities.name: WALKERS OF THE HIDDEN PATHS
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Turn, Your Movement Phase
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit that is within 3" of any terrain features and not in combat.
regimentAbilities.effect: Remove that unit from the battlefield and set it up again more than 6" from all enemy units. That unit cannot use MOVE abilities for the rest of the phase.

enhancements.name: REGROWTH
enhancements.declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 18" of your general to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
enhancements.effect: On a 5+, Heal (D6) the target.

enhancements.name: TREESONG
enhancements.declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of your general to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
enhancements.effect: On a 7+, add 1 to the Rend characteristic of the target unit’s melee weapons until the start of your next turn.

enhancements.name: GNARLED WARRIOR
enhancements.effect: Ignore negative modifiers to save rolls for your general.

enhancements.name: SEED OF REBIRTH
enhancements.effect: If your general would be destroyed, before removing them from play, roll a dice. On a 3+, your general is not destroyed and any remaining damage points inflicted on them have no effect. Then, Heal (1) your general. This unit cannot use this ability again for the rest of the battle.

battleTraits.name: TARGET OF VENGEANCE
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Battle Round (Army), Start of Battle Round
battleTraits.declare: If there is no enemy quarry on the battlefield, pick an enemy unit on the battlefield to be the target.
battleTraits.effect: The target is the quarry for the rest of the battle.

battleTraits.name: AIRBORNE COHESION
battleTraits.effect: Friendly units have a coherency range of 2".

battleTraits.name: SONG OF THE HUNT
battleTraits.effect: You gain 1 chord each time an enemy quarry is destroyed. The following cumulative effects apply depending on the number of chords you have: 1 chord: Simple: Add 1 to run rolls and charge rolls for friendly units while they are within 9" of the enemy quarry. 2 chords: Tuneful: Add 1 to hit rolls for friendly units’ attacks while they are within 9" of the enemy quarry. 3+ chords: Melodic: Add 1 to wound rolls for friendly units’ attacks while they are within 9" of the enemy quarry.

regimentAbilities.name: LEAVES ON THE WIND
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Battle (Army), End of Any Turn
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit that is in combat to be the target.
regimentAbilities.effect: The target can immediately use the ‘Retreat’ ability as if it were your movement phase and no mortal damage is inflicted on it if it does so.

regimentAbilities.name: LIFEBRINGERS
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn
regimentAbilities.effect: Heal (D3) each friendly unit.

enhancements.name: HEAD OF THE HUNT
enhancements.effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of your general’s melee weapons while the enemy quarry is within 9" of and visible to them.

enhancements.name: BOLD SPIRIT
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle (Army), Any Hero Phase
enhancements.effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to wound rolls for friendly units’ combat attacks while they are within your general’s combat range.

enhancements.name: ZEPHYRKIN
enhancements.timing: Reaction: You declared a Fight ability for your general
enhancements.effect: If your general charged this turn, they can move up to 2D6" after that Fight ability has been resolved. They cannot end that move in combat.

enhancements.name: CUNNING PURSUER
enhancements.effect: While your general is in combat, add 1 to charge rolls for friendly units wholly within 12" of them. Add 2 instead while your general is in combat with the quarry.

battleTraits.name: CALCULATED FEINT
battleTraits.effect: No mortal damage is inflicted on friendly Cavalry units by Retreat abilities.

battleTraits.name: KAVALOS LANCE
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly unit to be the target.
battleTraits.effect: For the rest of the turn, the target can pass across enemy models as if it had Fly.

regimentAbilities.name: FEIGNED RETREAT
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase
regimentAbilities.effect: For the rest of the turn, friendly units can use Charge abilities even if they used a Retreat ability in the same turn.

regimentAbilities.name: REINFORCED CONSTRUCTS
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit to be the target.
regimentAbilities.effect: The target has Ward (5+) for the rest of the turn.

enhancements.name: MIGHTY ARCHAEOSSIAN
enhancements.effect: Your general has Ward (5+).

enhancements.name: MURDEROUS BLADE
enhancements.effect: Your general’s Commander’s Blade has Crit (2 Hits).

enhancements.name: IMPERIOUS COMMANDER
enhancements.declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of your general to be the target.
enhancements.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, add 2" to the target’s Move characteristic for the rest of the turn.

enhancements.name: COLD SAVAGERY
enhancements.declare: If your general has not charged this turn and is in combat, pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target.
enhancements.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, add 1 to the Rend characteristic of the target’s melee weapons, including Companion weapons, for the rest of the turn.

battleTraits.name: SHADOWMASKED
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Turn, Any Charge Phase
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly Infantry unit that is in combat and did not charge this turn to be the target.
battleTraits.effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls and wound rolls for combat attacks that target that friendly unit for the rest of the turn.

regimentAbilities.name: BLEED THEM PALE
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly Infantry unit that is in combat and did not charge this turn to be the target.
regimentAbilities.effect: The target can move 6" but cannot end that move in combat.

regimentAbilities.name: MURDEROUS STRIKE
regimentAbilities.effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly Infantry units that charged in the same turn.

enhancements.name: SHADOW AVATAR
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Your Combat Phase
enhancements.effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of your general’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.

enhancements.name: FRENZIED EXHORTATIONS
enhancements.declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of your general to be the target.
enhancements.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, add 1 to ward rolls for the target for the rest of the turn.

enhancements.name: BOILING BLOOD
enhancements.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of your general to be the target.
enhancements.effect: Roll a dice. If the roll equals or exceeds the target’s Save characteristic, halve the target’s Move characteristic until the start of your next turn.

enhancements.name: BLADED IMPACT
enhancements.declare: If your general charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of them to be the target.
enhancements.effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.

battleTraits.name: STORM BREWING
battleTraits.declare: Pick a battlefield edge to be the target.
battleTraits.effect: That battlefield edge is leeward. For the rest of the battle, each time a friendly RIDE THE HURRICANE ability is used, after that ability has been resolved, change the leeward battlefield edge to the next edge clockwise.

battleTraits.name: PULLED BY THE WINDS
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Movement Phase
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly unit that is not in combat to be the target.
battleTraits.effect: The target can move D6" but must end that move closer to the leeward battlefield edge. It can pass through the combat ranges of enemy units but cannot end that move in combat.

battleTraits.name: GALE FORCE
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared an ATTACK ability
battleTraits.effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made as part of that ATTACK ability if the target of that ability is closer to the leeward battlefield edge than the unit using this ability.

regimentAbilities.name: LIFTED DEBRIS
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit that is closer to the leeward battlefield edge than the large terrain feature within friendly territory to be the target.
regimentAbilities.effect: Roll a number of dice equal to the current battle round number. For each 3+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.

regimentAbilities.name: ROARING HEADWIND
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Battle (Army), Enemy Hero Phase
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit to be the target.
regimentAbilities.effect: For the rest of the turn, each time the target uses a MOVE ability, it must end that move closer to the leeward battlefield edge.

enhancements.name: SCATTERED TO THE WINDS
enhancements.effect: Subtract 1 from the control scores of enemy units within 6" of your general for each friendly RIDE THE HURRICANE ability used this battle round.

enhancements.name: WIND WHISPERER
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle (Army), Any Hero Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick a battlefield edge to be the target.
enhancements.effect: Change the leeward battlefield edge to the target battlefield edge.

enhancements.name: TEMPLE GUARDIANS
enhancements.effect: While any friendly INFANTRY units are within your general’s combat range, both your general and those INFANTRY units have WARD (5+).

enhancements.name: CURVED SHOTS
enhancements.effect: You can measure the range and visibility of your general’s shooting attacks from any point on the leeward battlefield edge.

battleTraits.name: FATED ARRIVAL
battleTraits.description: Your Tzaangor Enlightened unit is not set up during the deployment phase. Instead, from the second battle round onwards, it can use the following ability:
battleTraits.effect: Set up this unit wholly within friendly territory, within 1" of a battlefield edge and more than 6" from all enemy units.

battleTraits.name: PREDICT THE FUTURE
battleTraits.effect: You can look at up to 3 cards from the top of your battle tactic deck without adding them to your hand. Then, in any order, return each card face down to either the top or the bottom of your battle tactic deck.

battleTraits.name: CHEAT DESTINY
battleTraits.timing: Reaction: You used a command on a battle tactic card
battleTraits.effect: Instead of discarding that card, return it face down to the bottom of your battle tactic deck.

regimentAbilities.name: CONSTANT FLUX
regimentAbilities.effect: Subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of weapons used for attacks that target friendly units while you are the underdog.

regimentAbilities.name: ARCANE RITUALISTS
regimentAbilities.effect: Add 1 to casting rolls for your general while they are wholly within 6" of another friendly unit.

enhancements.name: PREDICTED STRIKE
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Enemy Movement Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of your general and that is not in combat to be the target.
enhancements.effect: The target can move D6". It cannot move through the combat ranges of enemy units or end that move in combat.

enhancements.name: FOLD REALITY
enhancements.declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of your general to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
enhancements.effect: On a 6+, remove the target from the battlefield and set it up again wholly within 12" of your general and more than 6" from all enemy units.

enhancements.name: INFERNAL GATEWAY
enhancements.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of your general to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
enhancements.effect: On a 5+, roll either 3 dice or a number of dice equal to the number of battle tactic cards you have discarded this battle. For each 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.

enhancements.name: MUTAGENIC SORCERY
enhancements.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of your general to be the enemy target. Then, pick a friendly Tzaangors unit in combat with the enemy target to be the friendly target.
enhancements.effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+: Inflict an amount of mortal damage on the enemy target equal to the roll. You can return 1 slain model to the friendly target.

battleTraits.name: CYCLE OF CORRUPTION
battleTraits.description: If it is the first battle round, roll a dice to determine which Cycle ability can be used this battle round. If you roll a 5 or 6, roll again. If it is not the first battle round, the next Cycle ability in the sequence is used this battle round instead of any previous Cycle abilities.
battleTraits.effect: 1. NUMBERLESS PESTS: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target friendly units. 2. PLAGUE OF MISERY: While enemy units are within 6" of any friendly units, they cannot use abilities that heal or return slain models to a unit. 3. BURGEONING FILTH: Subtract 3 from the control scores of enemy units while they are in combat with any friendly units. 4. NAUSEOUS REVULSION: Subtract 1 from charge rolls for enemy units.

regimentAbilities.name: CORRUPTION OF THE LAND
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Your Turn
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a terrain feature, then roll a dice for each enemy unit within 3" of that terrain feature.
regimentAbilities.effect: On a 4+, inflict D3 mortal damage on that enemy unit.

regimentAbilities.name: PUTREFIED GROUND
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Battle, Enemy Hero Phase
regimentAbilities.effect: For the rest of the turn: Subtract 1 from the Move characteristic of enemy units. Subtract 1 from run rolls for enemy units.

enhancements.name: UNNATURAL VITALITY
enhancements.effect: Your general has WARD (4+).

enhancements.name: SUBCUTANEOUS SUPPURATION
enhancements.effect: Subtract 1 from wound rolls for attacks that target your general.

enhancements.name: GASEOUS EMANATION
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy unit within your general’s combat range to be the target.
enhancements.effect: The target has STRIKE-LAST for the rest of the turn.

enhancements.name: OVERRIPE DEATH’S HEADS
enhancements.declare: If your general is not in combat, pick a visible enemy unit within 7" of them to be the target.
enhancements.effect: Roll a dice. On a 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.

battleTraits.name: WAVE OF TERROR
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly unit to use this ability if it charged this phase and the charge roll was 10+. Then, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.
battleTraits.effect: The target has STRIKE-LAST this turn.

battleTraits.name: ETHEREAL
battleTraits.effect: Ignore all modifiers to save rolls for friendly units (positive and negative).

regimentAbilities.name: DEATH STALKERS
regimentAbilities.timing: Start of the First Battle Round
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit on the battlefield.
regimentAbilities.effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of melee weapons used for attacks that target that unit.

regimentAbilities.name: CHORUS OF TERROR
regimentAbilities.effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for combat attacks that target a friendly unit that charged in the same turn.

enhancements.name: SOULFIRE RING
enhancements.effect: If any models were slain by your general this turn, Heal (D6) your general.

enhancements.name: CLOAKED IN SHADOW
enhancements.effect: No more than 1 enemy unit can target your general with attacks (shooting or combat) per phase.

enhancements.name: BEACON OF NAGASHIZZAR
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase
enhancements.effect: Return 1 slain model to each friendly unit on the battlefield.

enhancements.name: SHADOW’S EDGE
enhancements.effect: Your general’s Sword of Stolen Hours has Crit (Mortal).

battleTraits.name: KRULEBOYZ WAAAGH!
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
battleTraits.declare: Pick your general to use this ability, then pick another friendly unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target.
battleTraits.effect: Your general and the target have STRIKE-FIRST this phase.

regimentAbilities.name: NOISY RACKET
regimentAbilities.effect: Subtract 1 from wound rolls for attacks made by enemy units in the first battle round.

regimentAbilities.name: COVERED IN MUD
regimentAbilities.timing: Start of the First Battle Round
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit to use this ability.
regimentAbilities.effect: In this battle, that unit is not visible to enemy models that are more than 12" away from it.

enhancements.name: EGOMANIAK
enhancements.effect: If any other friendly units are within your general’s combat range, before you allocate a damage point to your general, roll a dice. On a 4+, you must allocate that damage point to one of those units instead.

enhancements.name: MORK’S EYE PEBBLE
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Enemy Movement Phase
enhancements.effect: In the next shooting phase, friendly units have Ward (5+) while they are wholly within 12" of your general.

enhancements.name: KUNNIN’ PLAN
enhancements.timing: Once Per Turn, Your Hero Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" of your general.
enhancements.effect: If that unit uses a RETREAT ability this turn, no mortal damage is inflicted on it and it can still use SHOOT and/or CHARGE abilities later in the turn.

enhancements.name: EYE-BITER ASH
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with your general and roll a dice.
enhancements.effect: On a 1-4, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks made by that unit for the rest of the phase. On a 5+, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks made by that unit for the rest of the battle.

battleTraits.name: EYE OF THE GODS
battleTraits.effect: If a friendly HERO destroyed an enemy HERO or MONSTER, or captured an objective, roll on the Eye of the Gods table (e.g., 2-3: Stubborn Pride, 11-12: Dark Apotheosis).

battleTraits.name: DARK PACTS
battleTraits.effect: Pick a friendly unit and a Chaos God (Khorne, Tzeentch, Nurgle, Slaanesh). That unit gains a benefit until your next hero phase.

regimentAbilities.name: THE WILL OF CHAOS
regimentAbilities.effect: Pick a friendly CHAOS WARBAND unit within 12" of your general. That unit can immediately use the ‘Run’ ability and can still charge later in the turn.

regimentAbilities.name: CHAOS REAPERS
regimentAbilities.effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for friendly CHAOS WARBAND units while they are in combat with an enemy unit with 10 or more models.

enhancements.name: HELLFORGED WEAPON
enhancements.effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of your general’s melee weapons.

enhancements.name: CONQUEROR'S CROWN
enhancements.effect: Enemy units within 6" of your general cannot contest objectives.

battleTraits.name: RELENTLESS DISCIPLINE
battleTraits.effect: You gain 1 Relentless Discipline point at the start of each battle round. You can spend points to use command abilities without spending command points.

regimentAbilities.name: SHIELDWALL
regimentAbilities.effect: Friendly Mortek Guard units have +1 to save rolls.

enhancements.name: ARTISAN’S KEY
enhancements.effect: Pick a friendly unit within 12" of your general. You can return 1 slain model to that unit.

battleTraits.name: FEEDING FRENZY
battleTraits.effect: If an enemy model is destroyed by a friendly unit, that unit can immediately fight again.

regimentAbilities.name: BOUNDLESS FEROCITY
regimentAbilities.effect: Friendly Crypt Ghouls units have +1 Attacks while they have 10+ models.

enhancements.name: DREAD PALADIN
enhancements.effect: Your general has Ward (5+).

battleTraits.name: COURTS OF DELUSION
battleTraits.effect: Pick a delusion for your army (e.g., The Feast Day: re-roll hit rolls of 1).

regimentAbilities.name: KNIGHTLY ZEAL
regimentAbilities.effect: Friendly Morbheg Knights units can re-roll charge rolls.

enhancements.name: GRUESOME TROPHY
enhancements.effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for friendly units while they are within 12" of your general.

battleTraits.name: ’ERE WE GO!
battleTraits.effect: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units.

battleTraits.name: MIGHTY DESTROYERS
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Hero Phase
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly unit that was not set up this turn to be the target.
battleTraits.effect: The target can move up to 3". It can move into combat. If it was in combat at the start of the move, it must end that move in combat.

regimentAbilities.name: NATURAL DISASTER
regimentAbilities.effect: If you make an unmodified charge roll of 8+ for a friendly unit, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of that unit’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.

regimentAbilities.name: A PROPER RUCKUS
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Battle, Reaction: You declared the ‘Mighty Destroyers’ ability
regimentAbilities.effect: All friendly units on the battlefield that were not set up this turn are the targets of that ability instead.

enhancements.name: AMBERBONE WHETSTONE
enhancements.effect: The Rend characteristic of your general’s melee weapons is 2.

enhancements.name: ARMOUR OF GORK
enhancements.effect: Your general has WARD (6+).

battleTraits.name: SCIONS OF THE STORM
battleTraits.description: Yndrasta and your Annihilators unit are not set up during the deployment phase. Instead, from the third battle round onwards, they can use the following ability:
battleTraits.effect: LIGHTNING-STRIKE ARRIVAL: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units.

regimentAbilities.name: DRIVE THEM BACK
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick any number of friendly units that are both contesting an objective and in combat.
regimentAbilities.effect: Each of those units can make a pile-in move. For each unit that did so, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it and roll a dice. On a 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on that enemy unit.

regimentAbilities.name: DEFEND TO THE LAST
regimentAbilities.effect: Friendly units have WARD (6+) while they are contesting an objective you control.

enhancements.name: THE PRIME HUNTRESS
enhancements.effect: The Damage characteristic of Thengavar (Yndrasta’s spear) is 2D6 for attacks that target a MONSTER.

enhancements.name: STRIKE WITH THE TEMPEST’S RAGE
enhancements.effect: Your general has STRIKE-FIRST if they charged in the same turn.

battleTraits.name: THE LURKING VERMINTIDE
battleTraits.effect: You can set up one of your Clanrats units in reserve. It can be set up at the end of any of your movement phases wholly within 6" of a battlefield edge and more than 6" from enemy units.

battleTraits.name: GNAW-HOLES
battleTraits.effect: Pick a friendly unit that is wholly within 6" of a battlefield edge. Remove it from the battlefield and set it up again wholly within 6" of a different battlefield edge and more than 6" from enemy units.

regimentAbilities.name: OVERWHELMING MASS
regimentAbilities.effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for combat attacks made by friendly units while they are within 6" of any friendly Clanrats units.

enhancements.name: WARPSTONE-COATED WEAPONS
enhancements.effect: Your general’s Warpstone-tipped Glaive has Crit (Mortal).

enhancements.name: SKURRY AWAY
enhancements.declare: Pick your general to use this ability if they are in combat.
enhancements.effect: Your general can immediately use the ‘Retreat’ ability.

battleTraits.name: RANGER DOCTRINES
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared a FIGHT ability for your general or a friendly non-HERO unit wholly within 12" of your general
battleTraits.effect: Immediately after that FIGHT ability has been resolved, pick a point on the battlefield within 6" of your general. Remove the unit using this ability from the battlefield and set it up again within 1" of that point and not in combat.

regimentAbilities.name: CLOSE-QUARTERS DRILL
regimentAbilities.effect: Friendly units’ ranged weapons have Shoot in Combat but you must subtract 1 from hit rolls for their shooting attacks while they are in combat.

regimentAbilities.name: COME AND TAKE IT, BLAGGARDS!
regimentAbilities.effect: Add 5 to the control scores of friendly non-HERO units while they are in combat with any enemy units that have 6 or more models or a Health characteristic of 3 or more.

enhancements.name: THROWING KNIVES
enhancements.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 10" of your general to be the target.
enhancements.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.

enhancements.name: TRAINED RANGER
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 6" of a battlefield edge to be the target.
enhancements.effect: Remove the target from the battlefield and set it up again wholly within 3" of a battlefield edge and more than 6" from all enemy units.

enhancements.name: HOT-BLOODED ENDURANCE
enhancements.effect: Your general can use CHARGE abilities even if they used a RUN or RETREAT ability in the same turn and no mortal damage is inflicted on them by RETREAT abilities.

enhancements.name: BLADE OF THE KRAKEN
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
enhancements.effect: Double the Attacks characteristic of your general’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.

battleTraits.name: CLOAKED IN SHADOW
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly HERO to use this ability. Then, pick a different friendly unit that has 2 or more models to be the target.
battleTraits.effect: Make a shadow-travel roll of D6. On a 3+, remove the HERO using this ability from the battlefield and set them up again wholly within 6" of the target. They can be set up in combat with any enemy units that are already in combat.

regimentAbilities.name: WAY OF THE SKITTERING SHADE
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Movement Phase
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit that is wholly within 6" of a battlefield edge to be the target.
regimentAbilities.effect: Remove the target from the battlefield and set it up again wholly within 3" of a battlefield edge and more than 6" from all enemy units.

regimentAbilities.name: WAY OF THE FIENDISH CLAW
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Battle (Army), Any Combat Phase
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly HERO to be the target.
regimentAbilities.effect: The target has STRIKE-FIRST for the rest of the turn.

enhancements.name: MURDEROUS ACROBATICS
enhancements.effect: When your general uses the ‘Charge’ ability, they can pass through enemy models.

enhancements.name: MASTER OF SHADOWS
enhancements.effect: When your general uses the ‘Cloaked in Shadow’ ability, add 1 to the shadow-travel roll.

enhancements.name: JUST ANOTHER SHADOW
enhancements.effect: While your general is wholly within the combat range of a friendly unit that has 3 or more models, your general has Ward (4+).

enhancements.name: DEATH SCREECH
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy unit within 6" of your general to be the target.
enhancements.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, for the rest of the turn, subtract 1 from hit rolls for the target’s attacks.
